sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2438" key="ai(matoxarh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αἱμᾰτο-χᾰρής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n2438.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">delighting in blood</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
